evals.expected_output: Claude reads the plan file, extracts tasks, writes tests (RED), Codex audits tests, classifies as large, routes to Codex for implementation, code-reviewer reviews.
expectations: Claude reads the plan file at .claude/plan/projects-crud-api.md (Read tool called on the path)
Claude extracts task description and implementation steps from the plan
Claude writes test files first and verifies they FAIL (RED)
Claude reads tdd-specialist-role.md for test writing guidance
Claude calls mcp__codex__codex for test audit (Phase 3) before implementing
Claude classifies as large change (4+ production files) — excludes test files from size calculation
Claude announces 'Large change — routing to Codex' before implementing
Claude reads codex-architect-role.md and includes it in Codex developer-instructions
Codex call includes test file contents in the prompt so Codex can make tests pass
Codex developer-instructions include 'Do not modify test files'
Claude launches code-reviewer Task agent (not mcp__codex__codex-reply) for final review
Delivery includes TDD summary and Route: Large (Codex)

evals.prompt: Fix the off-by-one error in the pagination helper — it returns 11 items when limit is 10.
evals.expected_output: Claude writes tests (RED), Codex audits, classifies as small, implements directly, code-reviewer reviews.
expectations: Claude writes test files first and verifies they FAIL (RED)
Claude calls mcp__codex__codex for test audit (Phase 3)
Claude classifies as small change (1-2 files, <=30 lines implementation)
Claude announces 'Small change — implementing directly'
Claude implements with Edit/Write (not Codex MCP)
Claude verifies tests pass (GREEN) after implementation
Claude launches code-reviewer Task agent after implementation
Delivery includes TDD summary and Route: Small (Claude)

evals.prompt: Add logging middleware to all API routes using TDD.
evals.expected_output: Claude detects dirty worktree and stops before writing tests.
expectations: Claude checks git status in Phase 1 for uncommitted changes
Claude detects dirty worktree
Claude stops and asks the user to commit or stash
Claude does NOT write test files or proceed to Phase 2

evals.prompt: Add file upload validation to the attachment endpoint — check file type, size limit, and virus scan hook — using TDD.
evals.expected_output: Claude writes tests, classifies as large, but Codex is unavailable — falls back to Claude implementation with code-reviewer.
expectations: Claude writes test files first and verifies RED
Claude checks for mcp__codex__codex at Phase 3 and notes 'Codex unavailable — skipping audit'
Claude classifies as large change (3+ production files)
Claude checks for mcp__codex__codex at Route B and detects it's unavailable
Claude falls back to Claude direct implementation (does NOT stop)
Claude launches code-reviewer Task agent for review
Claude delivers successfully despite Codex being unavailable
